summary: A Fox News interview with Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons, on the ground in Dallas, condemning 'shoot ICE' chants and elected officials' rhetoric, intercut with Broadview, IL protest b-roll. It is a broadcast news interview, not a produced, music-driven spectacle.
notable_text: FOX NEWS; 'ILLINOIS PROTESTERS YELL "ARREST" & "SHOOT" I.C.E.'; 'DHS: ASSAULTS ON I.C.E. OFFICERS SKYROCKET 1,000%'; 'Todd Lyons | Acting I.C.E. Director'
